items.markdown:
![White Label Reporting and White Label Dashboards | Cyfe](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120926-3675-0139-0000-1766d9f561a8:20)
![20 Best White Label Dashboard Software Reviewed In 2026](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120926-3675-0139-0000-1766d9f561a8:21)
![What Is White Label Analytics? | Reveal BI](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120926-3675-0139-0000-1766d9f561a8:22)
![What Is White Label Analytics: Why It Matters, Benefits & More](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120926-3675-0139-0000-1766d9f561a8:23)
![20 Best White Label Dashboard Software Reviewed In 2026](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05120926-3675-0139-0000-1766d9f561a8:24)

A white-label dashboard is `a rebranded analytics or reporting interface that allows businesses to present data under their own branding, logo, and domain` . It eliminates third-party vendor branding from reports, login pages, and emails, making the software appear as if it was built in-house.[](https://whatagraph.com/white-label-dashboard) [[1]](https://whatagraph.com/white-label-dashboard)[[2]](https://agencyanalytics.com/features/white-label)[[3]](https://www.swydo.com/blog/best-white-label-reporting-tools/)[[4]](https://www.domo.com/glossary/what-is-a-white-labeled-bi-tool)

**Key Features and Benefits** 

- **Complete Customization:** Rebrand dashboards with your own logo, color schemes, and custom domain (e.g., `reports.youragency.com`).
- **Enhanced Professionalism:** Increases client trust by providing a seamless, branded experience.
- **Real-time Data:** Unlike static PDFs, these dashboards offer live, automated updates from various sources (PPC, SEO, Social).
- **Improved Retention:** Clients see the agency as the sole source of insights, preventing them from seeking out the software vendor directly.[](https://www.cyfe.com/white-label-dashboard/) [[1]](https://www.cyfe.com/white-label-dashboard/)[[2]](https://www.swydo.com/blog/best-white-label-reporting-tools/)[[3]](https://www.fanruan.com/en/blog/top-white-label-dashboard-platforms)[[4]](https://dashthis.com/white-label/)[[5]](https://agencyanalytics.com/features/white-label)

**Common Use Cases** 

- **Marketing Agencies:** Delivering SEO, PPC, and social media ROI reports.
- **SaaS Providers:** Offering embedded analytics within their own apps.
- **Financial Professionals:** Presenting CFO-level dashboards and metrics.[](https://whatagraph.com/white-label-dashboard) [[1]](https://whatagraph.com/white-label-dashboard)[[2]](https://dashthis.com/white-label-social-media-dashboard/)[[3]](https://www.clicdata.com/blog/white-label-reporting/)[[4]](https://www.domo.com/glossary/what-is-a-white-labeled-bi-tool)[[5]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SZVD2i7SSHI)

**Top White-Label Dashboard Solutions (2026)** [[1]](https://www.yo-kart.com/blog/top-whitelabel-marketplace-software-in-2026/)[[2]](https://www.fanruan.com/en/blog/top-white-label-dashboard-platforms)

- **[Whatagraph](https://www.google.com/search?q=Whatagraph&csui=3&hl=en&gl=US&uule=w+CAIQIFISCQs2MuSEtepUEUK33kOSuTsc&ved=2ahUKEwiUquWPj7OUAxURcfEDHc04KJcQgK4QegoIAggACAAIIhAP):** Known for marketing data analytics.
- **[DashThis](https://www.google.com/search?q=DashThis&csui=3&hl=en&gl=US&uule=w+CAIQIFISCQs2MuSEtepUEUK33kOSuTsc&ved=2ahUKEwiUquWPj7OUAxURcfEDHc04KJcQgK4QegoIAggACAAIIhAR):** Highly customizable and easy to use.
- **[AgencyAnalytics](https://www.google.com/search?q=AgencyAnalytics&csui=3&hl=en&gl=US&uule=w+CAIQIFISCQs2MuSEtepUEUK33kOSuTsc&ved=2ahUKEwiUquWPj7OUAxURcfEDHc04KJcQgK4QegoIAggACAAIIhAT):** Features strong client-facing reporting tools.
- **[Cyfe](https://www.google.com/search?q=Cyfe&csui=3&hl=en&gl=US&uule=w+CAIQIFISCQs2MuSEtepUEUK33kOSuTsc&ved=2ahUKEwiUquWPj7OUAxURcfEDHc04KJcQgK4QegoIAggACAAIIhAV):** Offers all-in-one, fully customizable dashboards.
- **[TapClicks](https://www.google.com/search?q=TapClicks&csui=3&hl=en&gl=US&uule=w+CAIQIFISCQs2MuSEtepUEUK33kOSuTsc&ved=2ahUKEwiUquWPj7OUAxURcfEDHc04KJcQgK4QegoIAggACAAIIhAX):** Focuses on comprehensive marketing reporting.[](https://www.cyfe.com/white-label-dashboard/) [[1]](https://www.cyfe.com/white-label-dashboard/)[[2]](https://whatagraph.com/white-label-dashboard)[[3]](https://dashthis.com/white-label/)[[4]](https://agencyanalytics.com/features/white-label)[[5]](https://www.tapclicks.com/blog/white-label-analytics-reporting-dashboard)

White-labeling is a critical tool for agencies looking to scale, as it creates a high-value, tailored client experience without the overhead of building the software from scratch.[](https://dashthis.com/white-label/) [[1]](https://dashthis.com/white-label/)[[2]](https://whatagraph.com/white-label-dashboard)[[3]](https://www.cyfe.com/white-label-dashboard/)[[4]](https://www.fanruan.com/en/blog/top-white-label-dashboard-platforms)

items.title: What is a white label dashboard?

expanded_element.title: White Label Marketing Dashboards For Agencies: Key Features - ClicData
expanded_element.description: Key Takeaways. A white label marketing dashboard lets your agency deliver branded analytics that clients perceive as your own proprietary platform, not a third-party tool. The best platforms centralize marketing data from Google Ads, Meta, HubSpot, GA4, TikTok, and dozens more, no CSV exports, no copy-paste.

items.title: What are the 4 types of dashboards?

expanded_element.title: The Different Types of Dashboards | by Antonio Neto - Medium
expanded_element.description: Understanding the different types of dashboards and their applications is crucial for selecting the right tool for a company's specific needs. Operational, tactical, strategic, and analytical dashboards offer different perspectives and levels of detail, complementing a data-driven approach.
